Plaintiffs Application For Default Judgment By Court (Other)
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Deputies Gasper and Brown; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:12 a.m. and concluding at 10:31 a.m.

Plaintiff Maxigtransfers LLC appearing represented by Jacqueline Foroutan, Esq. and Katherine SHepard, Esq., testifies via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness for Plaintiff Adrian Perez was sworn in and testifies.
Defendant Iris Yolanda Silva Acquirre not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff Adrian Perez and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Maxitransfers LLC, and against Defendant Iris Yolanda SIlva Aguirre, as follows:

Damages: $143,970.55
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $19,685.50
Costs: $167.00
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $163,823.05

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAXITRANSFERS LLC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
